newsitems.title: The RPG is now verified on Steam Deck!
newsitems.author: Red
newsitems.contents:
[p]We have exciting news for Deck owners!

While The RPG was already fully playable on the Steam Deck, we've been working on updates specific to the Deck and ironed out some kinks thanks to our communications with the Steam team. [b]The RPG is now Verified on the Steam Deck![/b][/p][p][/p][p]You can continue playing where you left off on whichever device you'd like by having your save files sync to your PC and Steam Deck through Steam Cloud.[/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/44099477/d098055b7b9c33a2fd99b220ed2180d4c336ccc4.png"][/img][/p][p][/p][p]If you have any suggestions for improvements, you can let us know on the [url="https://steamcommunity.com/linkfilter/?u=https%3A%2F%2Fdiscord.com%2Finvite%2F48fMKBdTEp"]Discord server[/url] or the [url="https://steamcommunity.com/app/2429270/discussions/?snr=1_5_9_"]Steam Discussions forum[/url].[/p]

newsitems.title: IMPORTANT Update 1.021
newsitems.author: Dionysus Acroreites
newsitems.contents:
[list]
[*]Fixed missing .exe (sorry for the hassle!)
[/list]

newsitems.title: Version 1.020
newsitems.author: Dionysus Acroreites
newsitems.contents:
[list]
[*]You can now chop down the Sacred Tree only after receiving the corresponding quest, preventing softlocks in the early stages of the game.
[*]Lots of UI fixes, including fixes for Steam Deck.
[*]Save system is now more robust. The chance of save corruption has been greatly reduced in case of a PC or game crash during saving.
[*]Localization fixes.
[/list]

newsitems.title: Version 1.019
newsitems.author: Dionysus Acroreites
newsitems.contents:
[list]
[*]German Community Localization - a complete revamp, thanks to our awesome adventurers on Discord!
[*]Fixes for other languages.
[*]Optimization.
[/list]

newsitems.title: Version 1.017
newsitems.author: Dionysus Acroreites
newsitems.contents:
[list]
[*]Added anti-epilepsy mode (in settings).
[*]Big optimization for major boss battles.
[*]Improved UX on controllers.
[*]Fix for Hangover Adventurer.
[*]Some rebalancing.
[*]Important UI/UX improvements for Steam Deck.
[/list]

newsitems.title: Trading Cards now available for The RPG!
newsitems.author: Red
newsitems.contents: [p]Steam Community Items are now available for The RPG! You can receive up to 4 trading cards for free by just playing the game, 1 for each 30 minutes of playtime![/p][p][/p][p]You can also grab the profile backgrounds and the emoticons by crafting the badge on Steam. Or get them through the Points Shop by clicking the button below.[/p][p][/p][p][url="https://store.steampowered.com/points/shop/app/2429270" style="button"]Points Shop[/url][/p]

newsitems.title: Version 1.016
newsitems.author: Dionysus Acroreites
newsitems.contents:
[list]
[*]Rebalanced fall damage.
[*]Bomb and Burn Scream kills now count as player kills and grant XP properly.
[*]Important fix for becoming "A Friend Of Monsters" if you decide to switch to monsters' side at late game.
[*]UI fix for controllers in the intro cart scene.
[*]Removed Feedback Form hint, although the F8 button still works. The reason is that it becomes too difficult to manage reports from Feedback Form as the community grows. Dear adventurers, please feel free to join our Discord for that. Steam Forums is an alternative, but it has some major cons for me to handle(there's a pinned thread with details).
[/list]

newsitems.title: Version 1.015
newsitems.author: Dionysus Acroreites
newsitems.contents:
[list]
[*]Fixed "Sacred Bark for Bestiary" quest flow.
[*]Fixed scream selection with cursor on controllers.
[*]Fargoth will no longer appear in the wrong places after certain game events.
[/list]

newsitems.title: Version 1.014
newsitems.author: Dionysus Acroreites
newsitems.contents:
[list]
[*]Important fix for some players who experienced crashed during save loading from the main menu.
[*]Added "Quit" button to in-game menu (no more ALT+F4 needed ^_^)
[/list]

newsitems.title: Version 1.013
newsitems.author: Dionysus Acroreites
newsitems.contents:
[list]
[*]Added "toggle sprint" option, a highly requested feature from players with controllers.
[*]UI fixes.
[*]Localization fixes.
[*]Improved Achievements support when transitioning from the demo to the full version.
[/list]

newsitems.title: Version 1.012
newsitems.author: Dionysus Acroreites
newsitems.contents:
[list]
[*]Fixed a bug with the blacksmith related to the tavern owner's quest.
[*]UI fixes.
[*]Fixed unassignable "A" keyboard key in controls settings.
[/list]

newsitems.title: Version 1.011
newsitems.author: Dionysus Acroreites
newsitems.contents:
[list]
[*]Fixed an issue where you might not join the gang even when all conditions were met.
[*]Now the game launches with a correct selected screen mode(Fullscree/Windowed/Borderless).
[*]Custom controls settings get saved.
[/list]

newsitems.title: Version 1.010
newsitems.author: Dionysus Acroreites
newsitems.contents:
[list]
[*]Fixed obtaining the key back from the King.
[*]Now you can leave the laboratory through the big door.
[*]More elevator fixes.
[*]Some optimization.
[/list]

newsitems.title: Version 1.009
newsitems.author: Dionysus Acroreites
newsitems.contents:
[list]
[*]Fixed "invincible" guards in Laboratory.
[*]Fixed a softlock when using elevator.
[*]Fixed some dialogues.
[*]Fixed stuck exile state for bandits.
[/list]

newsitems.title: Version 1.008
newsitems.author: Dionysus Acroreites
newsitems.contents:
[list]
[*]Fix for the "Set prisoners free at the Bandits' cave" quest.
[*]Fix for obtaining the "Battle Bread" quest.
[/list]

newsitems.title: Version 1.007
newsitems.author: Dionysus Acroreites
newsitems.contents:
[p]
Fixed being stuck in closed elevator after auto-save
Fixed being stuck at weird camera angles
"Invert Y" setting now works in cart scene as well
[/p]

newsitems.title: Version 1.006
newsitems.author: Dionysus Acroreites
newsitems.contents:
[list]
[*]Fixed "Unpatch the Silent guy's mouth" quest.
[*]Fixed infinite golden keys exploit at Tavern Dungeon.
[*]Your Fan won’t attack monsters anymore once you’re friends with them.
[/list]

newsitems.title: Version 1.005
newsitems.author: Dionysus Acroreites
newsitems.contents:
[list]
[*]Fixed a bug where the Cool King was not appearing at the bridge.
[/list]

newsitems.title: Version 1.004
newsitems.author: Dionysus Acroreites
newsitems.contents:
[list]
[*]Added "Respawn"[F6] button. Useful if you're stuck.
[*]Achievements are now correctly displayed in-game upon unlocking.
[*]Localization fixes.
[/list]

newsitems.title: Version 1.003
newsitems.author: Dionysus Acroreites
newsitems.contents:
[list]
[*]Added "Reset" button for controls in Settings menu.
[*]Fix for "Curse Battle Bread" quest.
[*]You will receive your Cursed Battle Bread back if it is missing.
[*]Disallow freeing captured adventurers until a proper quest is received, to avoid breaking the flow of the main questline.
[*]Fixes for Auto-Save feature.
[/list]

newsitems.title: Version 1.002
newsitems.author: Dionysus Acroreites
newsitems.contents:
[list]
[*]Added Auto-Save
[*]Patched a hole in Bandit's Cave
[/list]

newsitems.title: The RPG is now available!
newsitems.author: Red
newsitems.contents:
[p][/p][p]Hey everyone,

[b]The RPG is out right now! [/b]You can buy it with a 10% launch discount for the first week, running from August 7 to August 14.[/p][p]For more information about the content in the release version, you can click the button below to check out the previous announcement with a full list of content in the game.[/p][p][url="https://store.steampowered.com/news/app/2429270/view/498327923676152403?l=english" style="button"]Announcement with content list[/url][/p][p][/p][previewyoutube="nuHznIlVGfE;full"][/previewyoutube][p][/p][p]If you enjoy the game, leaving a review helps us out a ton. In addition to the reviews, you can also let us know your feedback on the [url="https://discord.com/invite/48fMKBdTEp"]Discord server[/url] or the [url="https://steamcommunity.com/app/2429270/discussions/"]Steam Discussions forum[/url].[/p][p][/p][p][b]The RPG is also fully playable on the Steam Deck! [/b]You can continue playing on whichever device you'd like by having your save files sync to your PC and Steam Deck through Steam Cloud. If you have any suggestions for improvements or any other feedback specific to the Steam Deck you'd like us to know, please refer to the links above for feedback channels.[/p][p][/p][p]If you played [url="https://store.steampowered.com/app/2361480/The_RPG_My_First_Dungeon_Smells/"]The RPG: My First Dungeon Smells[/url] before, you can directly import your save file to the full game. During save selection when starting a new game, you'll see a button to import your save if the game detects a save file from The RPG: My First Dungeon Smells. However, for the best experience, we recommend starting a new save.[/p][p][/p][p][/p][h2][b]Festivals[/b][/h2][p][/p][p]We are also taking part in two amazing festivals: [b]Tiny Teams [/b]and [b]Debut Festival[/b]. Huge thanks to the Yogscast and GameDev.ist teams for organizing these events, and including us! You can click the buttons below to check out all the great games included in the festivals.[/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/44099477/0f7103c5af60427147676367f430a8299f2a03fe.jpg"][/img][/p][p][url="https://store.steampowered.com/curator/423471/sale/tinyteams2025" style="button"]Tiny Teams 2025[/url][/p][p][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/44099477/971ccb83baeea3981da1a9974448c918c45dbe37.jpg"][/img][/p][p][url="https://store.steampowered.com/curator/44730990/sale/debutfestival2025" style="button"]Debut Festival 2025[/url][/p]

newsitems.title: The RPG is releasing on August 7!
newsitems.author: Red
newsitems.contents:
[p]Hi everyone,

We're really excited to announce that [b]The RPG will be releasing on August 7![/b] You can expect hours of content and a story where your choices actually matter![/p][p][/p][p]There will also be a special launch [b]discount of 10% for the first week[/b], running from August 7 to August 14. Don't miss out![/p][p][/p][previewyoutube="Rhe4uLpPM5M;full"][/previewyoutube][p][/p][h2][b]Full List of Content (There's A LOT)[/b][/h2][p] [/p][list][*][p]Between 6–12 hours of gameplay, depending on your choices. More than 60 quests, 4 guilds to join, and 3 different endings. And you can replay to make different choices.[/p][/*][*][p]The main island, smaller islands, a big cave, 16 dungeons for you to explore, and more than 40 secret zones.[/p][/*][*][p]More than 100 NPCs to interact with, and over 40 monsters to fight or befriend.[/p][/*][*][p]Plenty of choice with 100+ unique items, 10 armors, 14 melee weapons, customizable ranged weapon and bombs, 5 screams, and 12 skills to upgrade.[/p][/*][*][p]0 FISHING GAMES![/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]See you all on August 7! You can [url="https://discord.com/invite/48fMKBdTEp"]join our Discord[/url] for any updates in the meantime![/p]

newsitems.title: The RPG: My First Dungeon Smells is now available for free!
newsitems.author: Red
newsitems.contents:
Hi everyone,

The RPG: My First Dungeon Smells is out right now for everyone to [b]play for free![/b] Offering hours of content, in The RPG: My First Dungeon Smells, explore the island, clear levels in the dungeon, and complete quests.

Please [b]wishlist the full game[/b] if you enjoy this introductory version, as wishlists help us gain visibility for our game and show us your interest!

steam://openurl/https://store.steampowered.com/app/2361480/The_RPG_My_First_Dungeon_Smells/?snr=1_5_1100__1100&utm_source=steamwidget

[u][b]Your saves from The RPG: My First Dungeon Smells will transfer over to the full game when it launches. So, play to your heart's content for free now and continue your journey when the full game releases![/b][/u]

newsitems.title: The RPG is taking part in the Steam Next Fest: June 2025 Edition!
newsitems.author: Red
newsitems.contents:
Hey everyone,

We're really excited to announce that [b]The RPG is taking part in the Steam Next Fest: June 2025 Edition![/b]

Along with updates to the demo, we've also [b]added Steam items to the demo![/b] As you play the demo of The RPG, you'll be able to get item drops for your Steam inventory!

[b]The June 2025 edition of Next Fest runs June 9 at 10:00 AM PDT (UTC-7) to June 16 at 10:00 AM PDT (UTC-7). [/b]

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/44099477/073348c77ea8a2b5ffeb17d1d374f9a1736d34bb.png[/img]

newsitems.title: Behind The Scenes: Geeky Edition
newsitems.author: Dionysus Acroreites
newsitems.contents:
[h2]Smoke and mirrors[/h2]
Have you ever wondered how the game might look from "behind the scenes"? It's often quite strange and full of hacks. Smoke and mirrors. The bread and butter of Game Dev. 
The RPG is quirky be design on itself. But it's a true rabbit hole inside.
Let's see some examples!

[h2]The Main Protagonist[/h2]
This is a test scene, sort of a playground, where I test new mechanics, items, characters, etc. 
This how a player sees it:
[img]https://i.imgur.com/KmDNKLw.png[/img]
And this is what it actually looks like:
[img]https://i.imgur.com/GYSKS4z.png[/img]
Pretty, isn't it?

[h2]Debug View[/h2]
Just a regular converstaion between Protagonist and NPC:
[img]https://i.imgur.com/s95B20R.png[/img]
And from the developer's point of view:
[img]https://i.imgur.com/xB868k9.png[/img]
[img]https://i.imgur.com/OfOIqa1.png[/img]

[h2]Building Blocks, aka "Components"[/h2]
The game is made with Unity game engine. A common practice is using so called Components. Basically they are pieces of code that you write and attach to an object, like if you were building legos.
Let's take a look at the Protagonist's object's hierarchy, it's nested 
(this is not the full picture, it actually goes way deeper than that):
[img]https://i.imgur.com/5mUO05h.png[/img]
Each of those objects has it's own componts attached to it. Let's take a look at the root object's components set:
[img]https://i.imgur.com/55nUyu8.png[/img]
If you expand one of those components, you'll see this set of parameters which you can configure:
[img]https://i.imgur.com/DUWoSQO.png[/img]
Of couse it's more complex than that, because you also need to take into account current level, skill upgrades, difficulty settings, etc. That gritty job gets done in the rabbit hole called "source code".

[h2]Bonus[/h2]
The Fan is actually always with you(Protagonist) in the same scene.
He just may become invisible at some portions of the game. But HE. IS. ALWAYS. WITH. YOU.
[img]https://i.imgur.com/2vSOaGR.png[/img]
Yes, his initial position is a bit below you. You may ask why? I don't remember ¯\_(ツ)_/¯

[h2]That's it, folks![/h2]
Have a great time and get ready for the adventure, the release will happen this year!

newsitems.title: Updates, updates, updates!
newsitems.author: Dionysus Acroreites
newsitems.contents:
The Demo was released at version 0.7.5.17 back in December. 
I've been gathering feedback from you, guys, and been making constant updates. Now it's 0.7.5.39. 
So we had a whopping 22 iterations since than.

[h3]What's been done[/h3]
[list]
[*] New faction: royal guards
[*] New quests
[*] New dungeon
[*] Huge performance optimizations
[*] UI improvements
[*] Re-balancing
[*] The introduction stage is now more clear with small quests like "Buy a Dagger"
[*] Proofreading: less mistakes in dialogues
[*] Proper keys rebinding
[*] New settings and quaility-of-life things
[*] A ton of bug fixes
[/list]

[h3]The Introduction[/h3]
Also after watching a bunch of let's plays, I took a hard decision for an open world game and decided to lock the Village gates until you beat the very first boss. Let's explain why: in the very first dungeon (Beginner's Floor) you will get a scream/shout, a double jump and a ranged weapon - a mushroom thrower. The game becomes waaay more fun with all of those goodies. And, after that, the Village gates will open and you are free to explore the world!
And I left an option for hardcore players on how to get into the dungeon to an even deeper floor omitting the Village's Dungeon Entrance, haha!

So that's it for now, folks! Adventures await!
Please feel free to leave reviews and posts in discussions, it helps a lot.

Yours,
Dionysus Acroreites

newsitems.title: Free Demo Available Now with OTK Winter Games Expo!
newsitems.author: Red
newsitems.contents:
Hi everyone,

We are very excited to announce that The RPG will be among the great games showcased at the [b]OTK Winter Games Expo[/b], and for the first time, will have a [b]public demo available[/b] for everyone to play! 

Make sure to check out all the great games at the OTK Winter Games Expo by clicking [url=https://store.steampowered.com/curator/42428269/sale/wintergamesexpo24]here[/url]! The OTK Network will also be doing a broadcast for the Expo at 12 PM PT, December 4th. You can find the broadcast [url=https://www.twitch.tv/otknetwork]here[/url].

[b][h2]Demo[/h2][/b]
The demo offers the whole open world for you to play through and explore as you wish. The only limitation is a playtime limit of 45 minutes, but you can [b]extend the time limit to 60 minutes by defeating the boss at the end of the first dungeon[/b]!

As this will be the first time we have a public demo available, we're looking forward to all your feedback and reports. You can [url=https://store.steampowered.com/app/3221750/The_RPG_Demo/]leave a review on the demo page[/url] or use the [url=https://steamcommunity.com/app/2429270/discussions/]Steam discussions forum[/url] to leave your feedback, and we'll take all your opinions into account as we continue development!

If you like The RPG and want to support us, and stay up to date, [b]please wishlist the game[/b]! Wishlists help us reach more people, and are a great way to support us, thank you!

steam://openurl/https://store.steampowered.com/app/2429270/The_RPG/?snr=1_5_1100__1100&utm_source=steamwidget

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/44099477/616c3cbea0010f137f364ba5c850bc5c47ad21f5.png[/img]
